comment: 39yo male with primary sclerosing cholangitis diagnosed 7 years ago + concurrent ulcerative colitis (PSC-IBD subtype = very high CRC + cholangiocarcinoma risk). No current hepatobiliary or colorectal malignancy. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = annual MRI/MRCP + CA 19-9 for cholangiocarcinoma surveillance + annual colonoscopy from PSC diagnosis (PSC-IBD subgroup) + ERCP with brushings for dominant strictures + liver transplant evaluation as disease progresses; alternative = routine cadence q2-3y. Validates v0.3 PSC → cholangiocarcinoma + CRC prevention pilot. Patient is in the highest-risk subgroup.
